\tzpentry{ID3596}{Quantum Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3596 introduces Quantum Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{L}_{\text{coupling}} = \frac{g \mu_B}{\hbar} \vec{L}_{\text{mech}} \cdot \vec{\mu}_{\text{total}}(t) \end{equation}
